sentences.english: School was cancelled today because of the heavy snow.
I went outside with my brother to play.
We made a huge snowman with a carrot nose.
sentences.korean: 당근 코가 있는 커다란 눈사람을 만들었어요.

sentences.english: Then we had a snowball fight with the neighbor kids.
My hands got really cold but I didn't want to go inside.
sentences.korean: 손이 정말 시려웠지만 안에 들어가기 싫었어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
